title: Define event schema and types
description:
As a platform architect, I want a canonical event schema and type catalog, so that all services write and validate event files consistently.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Define required fields for each event type (issue_created, state_transition, comment_added, field_updated, issue_deleted).
- Enforce ISO8601 filenames and occurred_at, include actor_id, issue_id, event_id.
- Provide validation helpers that reject events missing required payload fields before writing.
creator: ryan

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Completed: shared EventRecord schema + EventType catalog and payload helpers in Rust/Python; filename generation and event helpers enforce required fields on write.
